name: PeakBirch Logic Inc.
summary: PeakBirch Logic Inc. engages in the e-commerce sales and delivery of cannabis-related and cannabidiol (CBD) containing products. The company distributes vaporizers, CBD related accessories, and ancillary products for aromatherapy and other applications, as well as CBD tinctures, topicals, edibles, and other products. It sells its products through Namastevapes.com, Everyonedoesit.com, LiftedCBD.com, Leafscience.com, and Lifted.com portals. PeakBirch Logic Inc. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
